violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Resource given to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Island Oasis blender pitcher were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
(Walk in cooler ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair. Observed missing door handle. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quaternary ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (fans in walk in cooler ) have an accumulation of dust and/or dirt. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The floors in kitchen and walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

(Milk) was observed held at (53) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Working containers of (dry food product) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Milk dispenser located in the (front counter) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 54Df.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS product in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
Establishment is lacking sink stoppers for 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
Leak observed at the plumbing under the 3 bay sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
